llm_calls.raw_response: public class Solution { int maxDepth(String s) { int currentDepth = 0, maximumDepth = 0; for (char character : s.toCharArray()) { if (character == '(') currentDepth++; else if (character == ')') currentDepth--; maximumDepth = Math.max(maximumDepth, currentDepth); } return maximumDepth; } }

public class Solution { private boolean isPalindrome(String s, int start, int end) { while (start < end) { if (s.charAt(start++) != s.charAt(end--)) return false; } return true; } public boolean checkPartitioning(String s) { int n = s.length(); for (int i = 0; i < n - 2; ++i) { if (isPalindrome(s, 0, i)) { for (int j = i + 1; j < n - 1; ++j) { if (isPalindrome(s, i + 1, j) && isPalindrome(s, j + 1, n - 1)) return true; } } } return false; } }

public class Solution { public int minimumLength(String s) { if(s.isEmpty()) return 0; int i = 0, j = s.length() - 1; // Loop to move 'i' past identical characters from the start while (i < j && s.charAt(i) == s.charAt(j)) { char remove_char = s.charAt(i); while (i <= j && s.charAt(i) == remove_char) i++; } // Loop to move 'j' past identical characters from the end while (i < j && s.charAt(i) == s.charAt(j)) { char remove_char = s.charAt(j); while (i <= j && s.charAt(j) == remove_char) j--; } return Math.max(0, j - i + 1); } }

public class Solution { public int minElements(int[] nums, int limit, int goal) { long sum = Arrays.stream(nums).mapToLong(Long::longValue).sum(); long diff = Math.abs(goal - sum); return (int)((diff + limit - 1) / limit); } }

public class Solution { public int minOperations(int[] nums) { return computeMinOperations(nums); } private int computeMinOperations(int[] nums) { int operations = 0; for (int i = 1; i < nums.length; i++) { if (nums[i] <= nums[i - 1]) { operations += (nums[i - 1] - nums[i]) + 1; nums[i] = nums[i - 1] + 1; } } return operations; } }

public class Solution { public int maxFrequency(int[] nums, int k) { Arrays.sort(nums); int colCount = nums.length, i = 0; long total = 0; int max_freq = 0; for (int j = 0; j < colCount; j++) { total += nums[j]; while (total + k < (long) nums[j] * (j - i + 1)) { total -= nums[i++]; } max_freq = Math.max(max_freq, j - i + 1); } return max_freq; } }

public class Solution { public int maximumElementAfterDecrementingAndRearranging(int[] array) { Arrays.sort(array); array[0] = 1; for (int i = 1; i < array.length; i++) { array[i] = Math.min(array[i], array[i - 1] + 1); } return array[array.length - 1]; } }

public class Solution { public int subsetXORSum(int[] nums) { int result = 0, n = nums.length, max_val = 1 << n; for (int i = 1; i < max_val; i++) { int xor_total = 0; for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if ((i & (1 << j)) > 0) { xor_total ^= nums[j]; } } result += xor_total; } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int maximumRemovals(String s, String p, int[] removable) { int low = 0, high = removable.length; while (low < high) { int mid = (low + high + 1) / 2; StringBuilder temp_s = new StringBuilder(s); for (int i = 0; i < mid; i++) { temp_s.setCharAt(removable[i], '-'); } if (isSubsequence(temp_s.toString(), p)) { low = mid; } else { high = mid - 1; } } return low; } private boolean isSubsequence(String s, String t) { int i = 0, j = 0; while (i < s.length() && j < t.length()) { if (s.charAt(i) == t.charAt(j)) { j++; } i++; } return j == t.length(); } }

public class Solution { public boolean checkOnesSegment(String s) { return computeCheckOnesSegment(s); } private int computeCheckOnesSegment(String s) { int count = 0; for (int i = 0; i < s.length(); i++) { if (s.charAt(i) == '1') { if (i > 0 && s.charAt(i - 1) == '0') { count++; } } } return count <= 1 ? 1 : 0; } }

public class Solution { public int eliminateMaximum(int[] dist, int[] speed) { int n = dist.length; int[] timeToReachCity = new int[n]; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { timeToReachCity[i] = (dist[i] + speed[i] - 1) / speed[i]; } Arrays.sort(timeToReachCity); int eliminated = 0; for (int i = 0; i < n && timeToReachCity[i] > i; i++) { eliminated++; } return eliminated; } }

public class Solution { private static final long MOD = 1000000007; public int numOfWays(int m, int n) { long a = 6, b = 6, c = 3, d = 3; while (--n > 0) { long temp_a = a, temp_c = c; a = (a * 3 + b * 2) % MOD; b = (temp_a * 2 + b * 2) % MOD; c = (c * 3 + d * 2) % MOD; d = (temp_c * 2 + d * 2) % MOD; } return (int)(m == 1 ? b : (a + c) % MOD); } }

import java.util.*; public class Solution { public int smallestChair(int[][] times, int targetFriend) { TreeMap events = new TreeMap<>(); for (int i = 0; i < times.length; ++i) { events.put(times[i][0], i); events.put(times[i][1], ~i); } TreeSet availableChairs = new TreeSet<>(); for (int i = 0; i < times.length; i++) { availableChairs.add(i); } int[] assignedChair = new int[times.length]; for (Map.Entry entry : events.entrySet()) { int idx = entry.getValue(); if (idx >= 0) { int chair = availableChairs.first(); availableChairs.remove(chair); assignedChair[idx] = chair; return idx == targetFriend ? chair : -1; // Early return for the target friend } else { availableChairs.add(assignedChair[~idx]); } } return -1; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.List; import java.util.Map; import java.util.TreeMap; public class Solution { public List> splitPainting(int[][] segments) { TreeMap line = new TreeMap<>(); for (int[] s : segments) { int start = s[0]; int end = s[1]; int color = s[2]; line.put(start, line.getOrDefault(start, 0) + color); line.put(end, line.getOrDefault(end, 0) - color); } List> res = new ArrayList<>(); int pre = 0, sum = 0; for (Map.Entry entry : line.entrySet()) { if (pre > 0 && sum > 0) { List temp = new ArrayList<>(); temp.add(pre); temp.add(entry.getKey()); temp.add(sum); res.add(temp); } pre = entry.getKey(); sum += entry.getValue(); } return res; } }

public class Solution { public String replaceDigits(String s) { char[] array = s.toCharArray(); for (int i = 1; i < array.length; i += 2) { array[i] = (char) (array[i - 1] + (array[i] - '0')); } return new String(array); } }

public class Solution { public int countGoodSubstrings(String s) { int count = 0; for (int i = 0; i < s.length() - 2; i++) { boolean isMatch = s.charAt(i) != s.charAt(i + 1) && s.charAt(i) != s.charAt(i + 2) && s.charAt(i + 1) != s.charAt(i + 2); if (isMatch) count++; } return count; } }

public class Solution { private static final long MOD = 1000000007; public int firstDayBeenInAllRooms(int[] nextVisit) { int n = nextVisit.length; long ans = 0; long[] dp = new long[n]; for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) { dp[i] = (dp[i - 1] * 2 - dp[nextVisit[i - 1]] + 2) % MOD; } return (int)dp[n - 1]; } }

import java.util.Arrays; public class Solution { public boolean canBeSorted(int[] nums) { int[] sorted_nums = Arrays.copyOf(nums, nums.length); Arrays.sort(sorted_nums); for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { boolean isMatch = nums[i] != sorted_nums[i] && gcd(nums[i], sorted_nums[i]) == 1; if (!isMatch) { return false; } } return true; } private int gcd(int a, int b) { while (b != 0) { int temp = b; b = a % b; a = temp; } return a; } }

public class Solution { public boolean stoneGameIX(int[] stones) { List cnt = Arrays.stream(stones).boxed().collect(Collectors.toList()); return (cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 1).count() != 0 && cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 2).count() != 0) || (cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 1).count() > cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 2).count() ? cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 1).count() > cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 2).count() + 2 : cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 2).count() > cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 1).count() + 1); } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public int maxQuality_dfs(int node, int time_left, int[] visited, int[] values, List> neighbors) { int acc = 0; for (int[] edge : neighbors.get(node)) { int neighbor = edge[0], cost = edge[1]; boolean isMatch = time_left >= cost && visited[neighbor] == 0; if (isMatch) { visited[neighbor] = 1; acc = Math.max(acc, values[neighbor] + maxQuality_dfs(neighbor, time_left - cost, visited, values, neighbors)); visited[neighbor] = 0; } } return acc; } public int maxQuality(int[] values, int[][] edges, int maxTime) { List> neighbors = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < values.length; i++) { neighbors.add(new ArrayList<>()); } for (int[] edge : edges) { neighbors.get(edge[0]).add(new int[]{edge[1], edge[2]}); neighbors.get(edge[1]).add(new int[]{edge[0], edge[2]}); } int[] visited = new int[values.length]; return maxQuality_dfs(0, maxTime, visited, values, neighbors); } }

public class Solution { public int timeToBuyTickets(int[] tickets, int k) { int time = 0; while (tickets[k] > 0) { for (int i = 0; i < tickets.length; ++i) { if (tickets[i] <= 0) continue; --tickets[i]; ++time; if (i == k && tickets[k] == 0) break; } } return time; } }

public class Solution { public ListNode reverseGroup(ListNode head, int k) { boolean isMatch = (head == null || k == 1); if (isMatch) return head; ListNode prev = null; ListNode cur = head; for (int i = 0; i < k; i++) { ListNode next = cur.next; cur.next = prev; prev = cur; cur = next; } head.next = cur; return prev; } public ListNode reverseEvenGroups(ListNode head) { ListNode dummy = new ListNode(0); dummy.next = head; ListNode prev = dummy; int n = 0; for (ListNode cur = head; cur != null; cur = cur.next) n++; for (int i = 1, k = 1; n >= 0 && k <= n; i++, k += i) { if (i % 2 == 0) { ListNode tail = prev.next; ListNode next = prev.next; for (int j = 0; j < k; j++) next = next.next; prev.next = reverseGroup(tail, k); tail.next = next; } n -= k; for (int j = 0; j < k && prev != null; j++) prev = prev.next; } return dummy.next; } }

public class Solution { public int numSmoothDescentPeriods(int[] prices) { return computeNumSmoothDescentPeriods(prices); } private int computeNumSmoothDescentPeriods(int[] prices) { int result = 0; int count = 0; for (int i = 1; i < prices.length; ++i) { if (prices[i] == prices[i - 1] - 1) { ++count; } else { count = 0; } result += count + 1; } return result + 1; } }

public class Solution { public int minOperations(int[] array, int k) { int[] dpTable = new int[array.length]; for (int i = k; i < array.length; i++) { dpTable[i] = Math.max(dpTable[i - k] + 1 - (array[i] - array[i - k]), 0); } return Arrays.stream(dpTable).sum(); } }

import java.util.Arrays; public class Solution { public int numberOfWeakCharacters(int[][] properties) { Arrays.sort(properties, (a, b) -> a[0] == b[0] ? b[1] - a[1] : a[0] - b[0]); return computeNumberOfWeakCharacters(properties); } private int computeNumberOfWeakCharacters(int[][] properties) { int maxDefense = 0, weakCount = 0; for (int i = properties.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { if (properties[i][1] < maxDefense) { weakCount++; } else { maxDefense = properties[i][1]; } } return weakCount; } }

public class Solution { boolean canDestroyAll(int mass, int[] asteroids) { List remainingAsteroids = Arrays.stream(asteroids) .filter(a -> a > mass) .collect(Collectors.toList()); return remainingAsteroids.isEmpty(); } }

public class Solution { public int smallestIndex(int[] nums) { return computeSmallestIndex(nums); } private int computeSmallestIndex(int[] nums) { for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { if (i % 10 == nums[i]) { return i; } } return -1; } }

public class Solution { public String capitalizeTitle(String title) { StringBuilder result = new StringBuilder(); for (int i = 0; i < title.length(); ++i) { char character = title.charAt(i); if ((i == 0 || title.charAt(i - 1) == ' ') && Character.isLetter(character)) { result.append(Character.toUpperCase(character)); } else if (character == ' ') { result.append(character); } else { result.append(Character.toLowerCase(character)); } } return result.toString(); } }

public class Solution { boolean isAOnlyBeforeB(String s) { int lastIndexOfA = -1; for (int index = 0; index < s.length(); index++) { if (s.charAt(index) == 'a') { lastIndexOfA = index; } else if (s.charAt(index) == 'b' && lastIndexOfA > -1) { return false; } } return true; } }

public class Solution { public int numOfBeams(String[] bank) { int m = bank.length; int n = bank[0].length(); int beams = 0; for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { boolean hasOne = false; for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if (bank[i].charAt(j) == '1') { hasOne = true; beams += bank[i].substring(j + 1).replaceAll("0", "").length(); break; } } if (!hasOne && i > 0) { for (int k = 0; k < n; k++) { if (bank[i - 1].charAt(k) == '1') { beams += bank[i].substring(0, j).replaceAll("0", "").length(); break; } } } } return beams; } }

import java.util.Arrays; public class Solution { public int lastPassengerTime(int[] buses, int[] passengers, int capacity) { Arrays.sort(buses); Arrays.sort(passengers); int lastIndex = 0; for (int bus : buses) { int cnt = 0; boolean isWithinRange = false; while (!isWithinRange && lastIndex < passengers.length && passengers[lastIndex] <= bus && cnt < capacity) { isWithinRange = true; cnt++; lastIndex++; } } return lastIndex == 0 ? buses[0] - 1 : passengers[lastIndex - 1] - 1; } }

public class Solution { int minSumOfSquaredDifference(int[] nums1, int[] nums2, int k1, int k2) { long result = 0; for (int i = 0; i < nums1.length; ++i) { int diff = Math.abs(nums1[i] - nums2[i]); int steps = Math.min(k1 + k2, diff); diff -= steps; k1 -= Math.min(k1, steps); result += (long)diff * diff; } return (int)result; } }

public class Solution { public int minSeconds(int[] amount) { return ((amount[0] + amount[1] + amount[2]) + 1) / 2 - ((Math.max(amount[0] + amount[1], Math.max(amount[1] + amount[2], amount[0] + amount[2]))) + 1) / 2 + (Math.max(amount[0] + amount[1], Math.max(amount[1] + amount[2], amount[0] + amount[2]))); } }

public class Solution { public int maxSumNumbersWithEqualSumOfDigits(int[] nums) { HashMap digitSumToMax = new HashMap<>(); int ans = -1; for (int num : nums) { int sumOfDigits = calculateSumOfDigits(num); updateDigitSumMap(digitSumToMax, sumOfDigits, num); checkAndUpdateAnswer(ans, digitSumToMax.get(sumOfDigits), num); } return ans; } private static int calculateSumOfDigits(int num) { int sumOfDigits = 0; for (int temp = num; temp != 0; temp /= 10) { sumOfDigits += temp % 10; } return sumOfDigits; } private static void updateDigitSumMap(HashMap digitSumToMax, int sumOfDigits, int num) { int prevMax = digitSumToMax.getOrDefault(sumOfDigits, 0); digitSumToMax.put(sumOfDigits, Math.max(num, prevMax)); } private static void checkAndUpdateAnswer(int ans, int currentMax, int num) { if (currentMax != 0) { ans = Math.max(ans, num + currentMax); } } }

public class Solution { public int minDeletions(int[] nums, int[] numsDivide) { for (int num : nums) { boolean found = true; for (int d : numsDivide) { if (d % num != 0) { found = false; break; } } if (found) { return nums.length - countOccurrences(nums, num); } } return Integer.MAX_VALUE == res ? -1 : res; } private int countOccurrences(int[] array, int value) { int count = 0; for (int n : array) { if (n == value) { count++; } } return count; } }

import java.util.List; import java.util.stream.Collectors; public class Solution { public int numberOfSubarraysWithZeroes(int[] nums) { List zeroIndices = nums.stream() .map(num -> num == 0 ? 1 : -1) .collect(Collectors.toList()); int count = 0, sum = 0; for (int index : zeroIndices) { if (index == 1) { sum++; count += sum; } else { sum = 0; } } return count; } }

public class Solution { public int minDaysToCompleteTasks(int[] tasks, int space) { HashMap taskLastComplete = new HashMap<>(); List daysList = Arrays.stream(tasks) .map(task -> { if (taskLastComplete.containsKey(task)) { int passedDays = days - taskLastComplete.get(task); if (passedDays < space) { days += space - passedDays; } } days++; return days; }) .collect(Collectors.toList()); return daysList.stream().max(Integer::compare).orElse(0); } }

public class Solution { public int longestIdealString(String s, int k) { int[] dp = new int[26]; for (char c : s.toCharArray()) { updateDp(dp, c - 'a', k); } return findMaxValue(dp); } private void updateDp(int[] dp, int index, int k) { int current = 1; for (int i = 0; i < 26; ++i) { if (Math.abs(i - index) <= k) current = Math.max(current, dp[i] + 1); } dp[index] = Math.max(dp[index], current); } private int findMaxValue(int[] dp) { int max = 0; for (int value : dp) { max = Math.max(max, value); } return max; } }

public class Solution { public boolean equalSumSubarrays(int[] nums) { Set totals = new HashSet<>(); for (int i = 1; i < nums.length; ++i) { int total = nums[i] + nums[i - 1]; if (totals.contains(total)) return true; totals.add(total); } return false; } }

public class Solution { final int MOD = 1000000007; final int MAX = 1001; static final int MOD_CONSTANT = 1000000007; int ways(int startPos, int endPos, int k, int[][] dp) { if (k == 0) return startPos == endPos ? 1 : 0; if (startPos < 0 || endPos < 0 || startPos >= MAX || endPos >= MAX) return 0; if (dp[startPos][k] != -1) return dp[startPos][k]; int left = ways(startPos - 1, endPos, k - 1, dp); int right = ways(startPos + 1, endPos, k - 1, dp); return dp[startPos][k] = (left + right) % MOD_CONSTANT; } int numberOfWays(int startPos, int endPos, int k) { int[][] dp = new int[MAX][k + 1]; for (int[] row : dp) Arrays.fill(row, -1); return ways(startPos, endPos, k, dp); } }

public class Solution { public int minDays(int[] power) { int n = power.length; int ans = (int)1e9; int[] dp = new int[1 << n]; Arrays.fill(dp, (int)1e9); dp[0] = 0; int[] sortedPower = Arrays.copyOf(power, n); Arrays.sort(sortedPower); for (int i = 0; i < (1 << n); ++i) { int powerSum = 0; int gain = 1 + Integer.bitCount(i); boolean canGain = true; for (int j = 0; j < n && canGain; ++j) { if ((i & (1 << j)) != 0) { powerSum += sortedPower[j]; } else if (gain > sortedPower[j]) { dp[i | (1 << j)] = Math.min(dp[i | (1 << j)], dp[i] + 1); canGain = false; } } } return dp[(1 << n) - 1]; } }

public class Solution { public int mostFrequentEven(int[] nums) { Map count = new HashMap<>(); int maxCount = 0; int mostFrequent = -1; for (int num : nums) { if (num % 2 == 0) { int freq = count.getOrDefault(num, 0) + 1; count.put(num, freq); if (freq > maxCount || (freq == maxCount && num < mostFrequent)) { maxCount = freq; mostFrequent = num; } } } return mostFrequent; } }

import java.util.HashSet; public class Solution { public int min_substrs(String s) { return computeMin_substrs(s); } private int computeMin_substrs(String s) { HashSet seen = new HashSet<>(); int count = 0; for (char c : s.toCharArray()) { if (seen.contains(c)) { count++; seen.clear(); } seen.add(c); } return count + (seen.isEmpty() ? 0 : 1); } }

import java.util.Arrays; public class Solution { public int maxMatchings(int[] players, int[] trainers) { Arrays.sort(players); Arrays.sort(trainers); int playerIndex = 0, trainerIndex = 0, matchCount = 0; boolean isWithinRange = true; while (isWithinRange) { if (players[playerIndex] <= trainers[trainerIndex]) { matchCount++; playerIndex++; trainerIndex++; } else { trainerIndex++; } isWithinRange = playerIndex < players.length && trainerIndex < trainers.length; } return matchCount; } }

public class Solution { public int min_money(int[][] transactions) { return computeMinMoney(transactions); } private int computeMinMoney(int[][] transactions) { int min_money_needed = 0; for (int[] transaction : transactions) { min_money_needed = Math.max(min_money_needed, transaction[0] - transaction[1]); } return min_money_needed; } }

public class Solution { public int minOperations(int[] nums) { int colCount = nums.length; int i = 0, j = colCount - 1; int operations = 0; while (i < j) { if (nums[i] == nums[j]) { i++; j--; } else if (nums[i] < nums[j]) { nums[i + 1] += nums[i]; i++; operations++; } else { nums[j - 1] += nums[j]; j--; operations++; } } return operations; } }

import java.util.HashMap; public class Solution { public boolean canEqualFrequency(String word) { HashMap freq = new HashMap<>(); for (char c : word.toCharArray()) { freq.put(c, freq.getOrDefault(c, 0) + 1); } HashMap count_freq = new HashMap<>(); int a = -1, b = -1; int acount = 0, bcount = 0; for (int f : freq.values()) { if (!count_freq.containsKey(f)) { if (a == -1) { a = f; acount++; } else if (b == -1) { b = f; bcount++; } else { return false; // More than 2 unique frequencies } } else { int existingCount = count_freq.get(f); if (existingCount > 0 && a != -1 && b != -1) { return false; // More than 2 unique frequencies } if (a == f) { acount += existingCount; } else if (b == f) { bcount += existingCount; } } } count_freq.put(a, acount); count_freq.put(b, bcount); return (acount == 1 && (a - 1 == b || a == 1)) || (bcount == 1 && (b - 1 == a || b == 1)); } }

entries.instruction: Consolidate the 3 separate loops in the isPalindrome method into a single pass. The current approach iterates over the same data structure multiple times. Merge the loop bodies to eliminate duplicate iteration and improve performance.

llm_calls.raw_response: public class Solution { private boolean isPalindrome(String s, int start, int end) { while (start < end) { if (s.charAt(start++) != s.charAt(end--)) return false; } return true; } public boolean checkPartitioning(String s) { int n = s.length(); for (int i = 0; i < n - 2; ++i) { if (isPalindrome(s, 0, i)) { for (int j = i + 1; j < n - 1; ++j) { if (isPalindrome(s, i + 1, j) && isPalindrome(s, j + 1, n - 1)) return true; } } } return false; } }

public class Solution { public int minimumLength(String s) { if(s.isEmpty()) return 0; int i = 0, j = s.length() - 1; // Loop to move 'i' past identical characters from the start while (i < j && s.charAt(i) == s.charAt(j)) { char remove_char = s.charAt(i); while (i <= j && s.charAt(i) == remove_char) i++; } // Loop to move 'j' past identical characters from the end while (i < j && s.charAt(i) == s.charAt(j)) { char remove_char = s.charAt(j); while (i <= j && s.charAt(j) == remove_char) j--; } return Math.max(0, j - i + 1); } }

public class Solution { public int minElements(int[] nums, int limit, int goal) { long sum = Arrays.stream(nums).mapToLong(Long::longValue).sum(); long diff = Math.abs(goal - sum); return (int)((diff + limit - 1) / limit); } }

public class Solution { public int minOperations(int[] nums) { return computeMinOperations(nums); } private int computeMinOperations(int[] nums) { int operations = 0; for (int i = 1; i < nums.length; i++) { if (nums[i] <= nums[i - 1]) { operations += (nums[i - 1] - nums[i]) + 1; nums[i] = nums[i - 1] + 1; } } return operations; } }

public class Solution { public int maxFrequency(int[] nums, int k) { Arrays.sort(nums); int colCount = nums.length, i = 0; long total = 0; int max_freq = 0; for (int j = 0; j < colCount; j++) { total += nums[j]; while (total + k < (long) nums[j] * (j - i + 1)) { total -= nums[i++]; } max_freq = Math.max(max_freq, j - i + 1); } return max_freq; } }

public class Solution { public int maximumElementAfterDecrementingAndRearranging(int[] array) { Arrays.sort(array); array[0] = 1; for (int i = 1; i < array.length; i++) { array[i] = Math.min(array[i], array[i - 1] + 1); } return array[array.length - 1]; } }

public class Solution { public int subsetXORSum(int[] nums) { int result = 0, n = nums.length, max_val = 1 << n; for (int i = 1; i < max_val; i++) { int xor_total = 0; for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if ((i & (1 << j)) > 0) { xor_total ^= nums[j]; } } result += xor_total; } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int maximumRemovals(String s, String p, int[] removable) { int low = 0, high = removable.length; while (low < high) { int mid = (low + high + 1) / 2; StringBuilder temp_s = new StringBuilder(s); for (int i = 0; i < mid; i++) { temp_s.setCharAt(removable[i], '-'); } if (isSubsequence(temp_s.toString(), p)) { low = mid; } else { high = mid - 1; } } return low; } private boolean isSubsequence(String s, String t) { int i = 0, j = 0; while (i < s.length() && j < t.length()) { if (s.charAt(i) == t.charAt(j)) { j++; } i++; } return j == t.length(); } }

public class Solution { private static final long MOD = 1000000007; public int firstDayBeenInAllRooms(int[] nextVisit) { int n = nextVisit.length; long ans = 0; long[] dp = new long[n]; for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) { dp[i] = (dp[i - 1] * 2 - dp[nextVisit[i - 1]] + 2) % MOD; } return (int)dp[n - 1]; } }

import java.util.Arrays; public class Solution { public boolean canBeSorted(int[] nums) { int[] sorted_nums = Arrays.copyOf(nums, nums.length); Arrays.sort(sorted_nums); for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { boolean isMatch = nums[i] != sorted_nums[i] && gcd(nums[i], sorted_nums[i]) == 1; if (!isMatch) { return false; } } return true; } private int gcd(int a, int b) { while (b != 0) { int temp = b; b = a % b; a = temp; } return a; } }

public class Solution { public boolean stoneGameIX(int[] stones) { List cnt = Arrays.stream(stones).boxed().collect(Collectors.toList()); return (cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 1).count() != 0 && cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 2).count() != 0) || (cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 1).count() > cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 2).count() ? cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 1).count() > cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 2).count() + 2 : cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 2).count() > cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 1).count() + 1); } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public int maxQuality_dfs(int node, int time_left, int[] visited, int[] values, List> neighbors) { int acc = 0; for (int[] edge : neighbors.get(node)) { int neighbor = edge[0], cost = edge[1]; boolean isMatch = time_left >= cost && visited[neighbor] == 0; if (isMatch) { visited[neighbor] = 1; acc = Math.max(acc, values[neighbor] + maxQuality_dfs(neighbor, time_left - cost, visited, values, neighbors)); visited[neighbor] = 0; } } return acc; } public int maxQuality(int[] values, int[][] edges, int maxTime) { List> neighbors = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < values.length; i++) { neighbors.add(new ArrayList<>()); } for (int[] edge : edges) { neighbors.get(edge[0]).add(new int[]{edge[1], edge[2]}); neighbors.get(edge[1]).add(new int[]{edge[0], edge[2]}); } int[] visited = new int[values.length]; return maxQuality_dfs(0, maxTime, visited, values, neighbors); } }

public class Solution { public int timeToBuyTickets(int[] tickets, int k) { int time = 0; while (tickets[k] > 0) { for (int i = 0; i < tickets.length; ++i) { if (tickets[i] <= 0) continue; --tickets[i]; ++time; if (i == k && tickets[k] == 0) break; } } return time; } }

public class Solution { public ListNode reverseGroup(ListNode head, int k) { boolean isMatch = (head == null || k == 1); if (isMatch) return head; ListNode prev = null; ListNode cur = head; for (int i = 0; i < k; i++) { ListNode next = cur.next; cur.next = prev; prev = cur; cur = next; } head.next = cur; return prev; } public ListNode reverseEvenGroups(ListNode head) { ListNode dummy = new ListNode(0); dummy.next = head; ListNode prev = dummy; int n = 0; for (ListNode cur = head; cur != null; cur = cur.next) n++; for (int i = 1, k = 1; n >= 0 && k <= n; i++, k += i) { if (i % 2 == 0) { ListNode tail = prev.next; ListNode next = prev.next; for (int j = 0; j < k; j++) next = next.next; prev.next = reverseGroup(tail, k); tail.next = next; } n -= k; for (int j = 0; j < k && prev != null; j++) prev = prev.next; } return dummy.next; } }

public class Solution { public int numSmoothDescentPeriods(int[] prices) { return computeNumSmoothDescentPeriods(prices); } private int computeNumSmoothDescentPeriods(int[] prices) { int result = 0; int count = 0; for (int i = 1; i < prices.length; ++i) { if (prices[i] == prices[i - 1] - 1) { ++count; } else { count = 0; } result += count + 1; } return result + 1; } }

public class Solution { public int minOperations(int[] array, int k) { int[] dpTable = new int[array.length]; for (int i = k; i < array.length; i++) { dpTable[i] = Math.max(dpTable[i - k] + 1 - (array[i] - array[i - k]), 0); } return Arrays.stream(dpTable).sum(); } }

import java.util.Arrays; public class Solution { public int numberOfWeakCharacters(int[][] properties) { Arrays.sort(properties, (a, b) -> a[0] == b[0] ? b[1] - a[1] : a[0] - b[0]); return computeNumberOfWeakCharacters(properties); } private int computeNumberOfWeakCharacters(int[][] properties) { int maxDefense = 0, weakCount = 0; for (int i = properties.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { if (properties[i][1] < maxDefense) { weakCount++; } else { maxDefense = properties[i][1]; } } return weakCount; } }

public class Solution { boolean canDestroyAll(int mass, int[] asteroids) { List remainingAsteroids = Arrays.stream(asteroids) .filter(a -> a > mass) .collect(Collectors.toList()); return remainingAsteroids.isEmpty(); } }

public class Solution { public int smallestIndex(int[] nums) { return computeSmallestIndex(nums); } private int computeSmallestIndex(int[] nums) { for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { if (i % 10 == nums[i]) { return i; } } return -1; } }

public class Solution { public String capitalizeTitle(String title) { StringBuilder result = new StringBuilder(); for (int i = 0; i < title.length(); ++i) { char character = title.charAt(i); if ((i == 0 || title.charAt(i - 1) == ' ') && Character.isLetter(character)) { result.append(Character.toUpperCase(character)); } else if (character == ' ') { result.append(character); } else { result.append(Character.toLowerCase(character)); } } return result.toString(); } }

public class Solution { boolean isAOnlyBeforeB(String s) { int lastIndexOfA = -1; for (int index = 0; index < s.length(); index++) { if (s.charAt(index) == 'a') { lastIndexOfA = index; } else if (s.charAt(index) == 'b' && lastIndexOfA > -1) { return false; } } return true; } }

public class Solution { public int numOfBeams(String[] bank) { int m = bank.length; int n = bank[0].length(); int beams = 0; for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { boolean hasOne = false; for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if (bank[i].charAt(j) == '1') { hasOne = true; beams += bank[i].substring(j + 1).replaceAll("0", "").length(); break; } } if (!hasOne && i > 0) { for (int k = 0; k < n; k++) { if (bank[i - 1].charAt(k) == '1') { beams += bank[i].substring(0, j).replaceAll("0", "").length(); break; } } } } return beams; } }

import java.util.Arrays; public class Solution { public int lastPassengerTime(int[] buses, int[] passengers, int capacity) { Arrays.sort(buses); Arrays.sort(passengers); int lastIndex = 0; for (int bus : buses) { int cnt = 0; boolean isWithinRange = false; while (!isWithinRange && lastIndex < passengers.length && passengers[lastIndex] <= bus && cnt < capacity) { isWithinRange = true; cnt++; lastIndex++; } } return lastIndex == 0 ? buses[0] - 1 : passengers[lastIndex - 1] - 1; } }

public class Solution { int minSumOfSquaredDifference(int[] nums1, int[] nums2, int k1, int k2) { long result = 0; for (int i = 0; i < nums1.length; ++i) { int diff = Math.abs(nums1[i] - nums2[i]); int steps = Math.min(k1 + k2, diff); diff -= steps; k1 -= Math.min(k1, steps); result += (long)diff * diff; } return (int)result; } }

public class Solution { public int minSeconds(int[] amount) { return ((amount[0] + amount[1] + amount[2]) + 1) / 2 - ((Math.max(amount[0] + amount[1], Math.max(amount[1] + amount[2], amount[0] + amount[2]))) + 1) / 2 + (Math.max(amount[0] + amount[1], Math.max(amount[1] + amount[2], amount[0] + amount[2]))); } }

public class Solution { public int maxSumNumbersWithEqualSumOfDigits(int[] nums) { HashMap digitSumToMax = new HashMap<>(); int ans = -1; for (int num : nums) { int sumOfDigits = calculateSumOfDigits(num); updateDigitSumMap(digitSumToMax, sumOfDigits, num); checkAndUpdateAnswer(ans, digitSumToMax.get(sumOfDigits), num); } return ans; } private static int calculateSumOfDigits(int num) { int sumOfDigits = 0; for (int temp = num; temp != 0; temp /= 10) { sumOfDigits += temp % 10; } return sumOfDigits; } private static void updateDigitSumMap(HashMap digitSumToMax, int sumOfDigits, int num) { int prevMax = digitSumToMax.getOrDefault(sumOfDigits, 0); digitSumToMax.put(sumOfDigits, Math.max(num, prevMax)); } private static void checkAndUpdateAnswer(int ans, int currentMax, int num) { if (currentMax != 0) { ans = Math.max(ans, num + currentMax); } } }

public class Solution { public int minDeletions(int[] nums, int[] numsDivide) { for (int num : nums) { boolean found = true; for (int d : numsDivide) { if (d % num != 0) { found = false; break; } } if (found) { return nums.length - countOccurrences(nums, num); } } return Integer.MAX_VALUE == res ? -1 : res; } private int countOccurrences(int[] array, int value) { int count = 0; for (int n : array) { if (n == value) { count++; } } return count; } }

import java.util.List; import java.util.stream.Collectors; public class Solution { public int numberOfSubarraysWithZeroes(int[] nums) { List zeroIndices = nums.stream() .map(num -> num == 0 ? 1 : -1) .collect(Collectors.toList()); int count = 0, sum = 0; for (int index : zeroIndices) { if (index == 1) { sum++; count += sum; } else { sum = 0; } } return count; } }

public class Solution { public int minDaysToCompleteTasks(int[] tasks, int space) { HashMap taskLastComplete = new HashMap<>(); List daysList = Arrays.stream(tasks) .map(task -> { if (taskLastComplete.containsKey(task)) { int passedDays = days - taskLastComplete.get(task); if (passedDays < space) { days += space - passedDays; } } days++; return days; }) .collect(Collectors.toList()); return daysList.stream().max(Integer::compare).orElse(0); } }

public class Solution { public int longestIdealString(String s, int k) { int[] dp = new int[26]; for (char c : s.toCharArray()) { updateDp(dp, c - 'a', k); } return findMaxValue(dp); } private void updateDp(int[] dp, int index, int k) { int current = 1; for (int i = 0; i < 26; ++i) { if (Math.abs(i - index) <= k) current = Math.max(current, dp[i] + 1); } dp[index] = Math.max(dp[index], current); } private int findMaxValue(int[] dp) { int max = 0; for (int value : dp) { max = Math.max(max, value); } return max; } }

public class Solution { public boolean equalSumSubarrays(int[] nums) { Set totals = new HashSet<>(); for (int i = 1; i < nums.length; ++i) { int total = nums[i] + nums[i - 1]; if (totals.contains(total)) return true; totals.add(total); } return false; } }

public class Solution { final int MOD = 1000000007; final int MAX = 1001; static final int MOD_CONSTANT = 1000000007; int ways(int startPos, int endPos, int k, int[][] dp) { if (k == 0) return startPos == endPos ? 1 : 0; if (startPos < 0 || endPos < 0 || startPos >= MAX || endPos >= MAX) return 0; if (dp[startPos][k] != -1) return dp[startPos][k]; int left = ways(startPos - 1, endPos, k - 1, dp); int right = ways(startPos + 1, endPos, k - 1, dp); return dp[startPos][k] = (left + right) % MOD_CONSTANT; } int numberOfWays(int startPos, int endPos, int k) { int[][] dp = new int[MAX][k + 1]; for (int[] row : dp) Arrays.fill(row, -1); return ways(startPos, endPos, k, dp); } }

public class Solution { public int minDays(int[] power) { int n = power.length; int ans = (int)1e9; int[] dp = new int[1 << n]; Arrays.fill(dp, (int)1e9); dp[0] = 0; int[] sortedPower = Arrays.copyOf(power, n); Arrays.sort(sortedPower); for (int i = 0; i < (1 << n); ++i) { int powerSum = 0; int gain = 1 + Integer.bitCount(i); boolean canGain = true; for (int j = 0; j < n && canGain; ++j) { if ((i & (1 << j)) != 0) { powerSum += sortedPower[j]; } else if (gain > sortedPower[j]) { dp[i | (1 << j)] = Math.min(dp[i | (1 << j)], dp[i] + 1); canGain = false; } } } return dp[(1 << n) - 1]; } }

public class Solution { public int mostFrequentEven(int[] nums) { Map count = new HashMap<>(); int maxCount = 0; int mostFrequent = -1; for (int num : nums) { if (num % 2 == 0) { int freq = count.getOrDefault(num, 0) + 1; count.put(num, freq); if (freq > maxCount || (freq == maxCount && num < mostFrequent)) { maxCount = freq; mostFrequent = num; } } } return mostFrequent; } }

import java.util.HashSet; public class Solution { public int min_substrs(String s) { return computeMin_substrs(s); } private int computeMin_substrs(String s) { HashSet seen = new HashSet<>(); int count = 0; for (char c : s.toCharArray()) { if (seen.contains(c)) { count++; seen.clear(); } seen.add(c); } return count + (seen.isEmpty() ? 0 : 1); } }

import java.util.Arrays; public class Solution { public int maxMatchings(int[] players, int[] trainers) { Arrays.sort(players); Arrays.sort(trainers); int playerIndex = 0, trainerIndex = 0, matchCount = 0; boolean isWithinRange = true; while (isWithinRange) { if (players[playerIndex] <= trainers[trainerIndex]) { matchCount++; playerIndex++; trainerIndex++; } else { trainerIndex++; } isWithinRange = playerIndex < players.length && trainerIndex < trainers.length; } return matchCount; } }

public class Solution { public int min_money(int[][] transactions) { return computeMinMoney(transactions); } private int computeMinMoney(int[][] transactions) { int min_money_needed = 0; for (int[] transaction : transactions) { min_money_needed = Math.max(min_money_needed, transaction[0] - transaction[1]); } return min_money_needed; } }

public class Solution { public int minOperations(int[] nums) { int colCount = nums.length; int i = 0, j = colCount - 1; int operations = 0; while (i < j) { if (nums[i] == nums[j]) { i++; j--; } else if (nums[i] < nums[j]) { nums[i + 1] += nums[i]; i++; operations++; } else { nums[j - 1] += nums[j]; j--; operations++; } } return operations; } }

import java.util.HashMap; public class Solution { public boolean canEqualFrequency(String word) { HashMap freq = new HashMap<>(); for (char c : word.toCharArray()) { freq.put(c, freq.getOrDefault(c, 0) + 1); } HashMap count_freq = new HashMap<>(); int a = -1, b = -1; int acount = 0, bcount = 0; for (int f : freq.values()) { if (!count_freq.containsKey(f)) { if (a == -1) { a = f; acount++; } else if (b == -1) { b = f; bcount++; } else { return false; // More than 2 unique frequencies } } else { int existingCount = count_freq.get(f); if (existingCount > 0 && a != -1 && b != -1) { return false; // More than 2 unique frequencies } if (a == f) { acount += existingCount; } else if (b == f) { bcount += existingCount; } } } count_freq.put(a, acount); count_freq.put(b, bcount); return (acount == 1 && (a - 1 == b || a == 1)) || (bcount == 1 && (b - 1 == a || b == 1)); } }

entries.instruction: Split the nested loop in the minimumLength method into separate loops, each handling one distinct aspect of the computation. The current structure combines multiple responsibilities in a single nested loop, making the logic harder to follow.

llm_calls.raw_response: public class Solution { public int minimumLength(String s) { if(s.isEmpty()) return 0; int i = 0, j = s.length() - 1; // Loop to move 'i' past identical characters from the start while (i < j && s.charAt(i) == s.charAt(j)) { char remove_char = s.charAt(i); while (i <= j && s.charAt(i) == remove_char) i++; } // Loop to move 'j' past identical characters from the end while (i < j && s.charAt(i) == s.charAt(j)) { char remove_char = s.charAt(j); while (i <= j && s.charAt(j) == remove_char) j--; } return Math.max(0, j - i + 1); } }

public class Solution { public int minElements(int[] nums, int limit, int goal) { long sum = Arrays.stream(nums).mapToLong(Long::longValue).sum(); long diff = Math.abs(goal - sum); return (int)((diff + limit - 1) / limit); } }

public class Solution { public int minOperations(int[] nums) { return computeMinOperations(nums); } private int computeMinOperations(int[] nums) { int operations = 0; for (int i = 1; i < nums.length; i++) { if (nums[i] <= nums[i - 1]) { operations += (nums[i - 1] - nums[i]) + 1; nums[i] = nums[i - 1] + 1; } } return operations; } }

public class Solution { public int maxFrequency(int[] nums, int k) { Arrays.sort(nums); int colCount = nums.length, i = 0; long total = 0; int max_freq = 0; for (int j = 0; j < colCount; j++) { total += nums[j]; while (total + k < (long) nums[j] * (j - i + 1)) { total -= nums[i++]; } max_freq = Math.max(max_freq, j - i + 1); } return max_freq; } }

public class Solution { public int maximumElementAfterDecrementingAndRearranging(int[] array) { Arrays.sort(array); array[0] = 1; for (int i = 1; i < array.length; i++) { array[i] = Math.min(array[i], array[i - 1] + 1); } return array[array.length - 1]; } }

public class Solution { public int subsetXORSum(int[] nums) { int result = 0, n = nums.length, max_val = 1 << n; for (int i = 1; i < max_val; i++) { int xor_total = 0; for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if ((i & (1 << j)) > 0) { xor_total ^= nums[j]; } } result += xor_total; } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int maximumRemovals(String s, String p, int[] removable) { int low = 0, high = removable.length; while (low < high) { int mid = (low + high + 1) / 2; StringBuilder temp_s = new StringBuilder(s); for (int i = 0; i < mid; i++) { temp_s.setCharAt(removable[i], '-'); } if (isSubsequence(temp_s.toString(), p)) { low = mid; } else { high = mid - 1; } } return low; } private boolean isSubsequence(String s, String t) { int i = 0, j = 0; while (i < s.length() && j < t.length()) { if (s.charAt(i) == t.charAt(j)) { j++; } i++; } return j == t.length(); } }

public class Solution { public boolean checkOnesSegment(String s) { return computeCheckOnesSegment(s); } private int computeCheckOnesSegment(String s) { int count = 0; for (int i = 0; i < s.length(); i++) { if (s.charAt(i) == '1') { if (i > 0 && s.charAt(i - 1) == '0') { count++; } } } return count <= 1 ? 1 : 0; } }

public class Solution { public int eliminateMaximum(int[] dist, int[] speed) { int n = dist.length; int[] timeToReachCity = new int[n]; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { timeToReachCity[i] = (dist[i] + speed[i] - 1) / speed[i]; } Arrays.sort(timeToReachCity); int eliminated = 0; for (int i = 0; i < n && timeToReachCity[i] > i; i++) { eliminated++; } return eliminated; } }

public class Solution { private static final long MOD = 1000000007; public int numOfWays(int m, int n) { long a = 6, b = 6, c = 3, d = 3; while (--n > 0) { long temp_a = a, temp_c = c; a = (a * 3 + b * 2) % MOD; b = (temp_a * 2 + b * 2) % MOD; c = (c * 3 + d * 2) % MOD; d = (temp_c * 2 + d * 2) % MOD; } return (int)(m == 1 ? b : (a + c) % MOD); } }

import java.util.*; public class Solution { public int smallestChair(int[][] times, int targetFriend) { TreeMap events = new TreeMap<>(); for (int i = 0; i < times.length; ++i) { events.put(times[i][0], i); events.put(times[i][1], ~i); } TreeSet availableChairs = new TreeSet<>(); for (int i = 0; i < times.length; i++) { availableChairs.add(i); } int[] assignedChair = new int[times.length]; for (Map.Entry entry : events.entrySet()) { int idx = entry.getValue(); if (idx >= 0) { int chair = availableChairs.first(); availableChairs.remove(chair); assignedChair[idx] = chair; return idx == targetFriend ? chair : -1; // Early return for the target friend } else { availableChairs.add(assignedChair[~idx]); } } return -1; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.List; import java.util.Map; import java.util.TreeMap; public class Solution { public List> splitPainting(int[][] segments) { TreeMap line = new TreeMap<>(); for (int[] s : segments) { int start = s[0]; int end = s[1]; int color = s[2]; line.put(start, line.getOrDefault(start, 0) + color); line.put(end, line.getOrDefault(end, 0) - color); } List> res = new ArrayList<>(); int pre = 0, sum = 0; for (Map.Entry entry : line.entrySet()) { if (pre > 0 && sum > 0) { List temp = new ArrayList<>(); temp.add(pre); temp.add(entry.getKey()); temp.add(sum); res.add(temp); } pre = entry.getKey(); sum += entry.getValue(); } return res; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public int maxQuality_dfs(int node, int time_left, int[] visited, int[] values, List> neighbors) { int acc = 0; for (int[] edge : neighbors.get(node)) { int neighbor = edge[0], cost = edge[1]; boolean isMatch = time_left >= cost && visited[neighbor] == 0; if (isMatch) { visited[neighbor] = 1; acc = Math.max(acc, values[neighbor] + maxQuality_dfs(neighbor, time_left - cost, visited, values, neighbors)); visited[neighbor] = 0; } } return acc; } public int maxQuality(int[] values, int[][] edges, int maxTime) { List> neighbors = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < values.length; i++) { neighbors.add(new ArrayList<>()); } for (int[] edge : edges) { neighbors.get(edge[0]).add(new int[]{edge[1], edge[2]}); neighbors.get(edge[1]).add(new int[]{edge[0], edge[2]}); } int[] visited = new int[values.length]; return maxQuality_dfs(0, maxTime, visited, values, neighbors); } }

public class Solution { public ListNode reverseGroup(ListNode head, int k) { boolean isMatch = (head == null || k == 1); if (isMatch) return head; ListNode prev = null; ListNode cur = head; for (int i = 0; i < k; i++) { ListNode next = cur.next; cur.next = prev; prev = cur; cur = next; } head.next = cur; return prev; } public ListNode reverseEvenGroups(ListNode head) { ListNode dummy = new ListNode(0); dummy.next = head; ListNode prev = dummy; int n = 0; for (ListNode cur = head; cur != null; cur = cur.next) n++; for (int i = 1, k = 1; n >= 0 && k <= n; i++, k += i) { if (i % 2 == 0) { ListNode tail = prev.next; ListNode next = prev.next; for (int j = 0; j < k; j++) next = next.next; prev.next = reverseGroup(tail, k); tail.next = next; } n -= k; for (int j = 0; j < k && prev != null; j++) prev = prev.next; } return dummy.next; } }

public class Solution { public int numSmoothDescentPeriods(int[] prices) { return computeNumSmoothDescentPeriods(prices); } private int computeNumSmoothDescentPeriods(int[] prices) { int result = 0; int count = 0; for (int i = 1; i < prices.length; ++i) { if (prices[i] == prices[i - 1] - 1) { ++count; } else { count = 0; } result += count + 1; } return result + 1; } }

public class Solution { public int minOperations(int[] array, int k) { int[] dpTable = new int[array.length]; for (int i = k; i < array.length; i++) { dpTable[i] = Math.max(dpTable[i - k] + 1 - (array[i] - array[i - k]), 0); } return Arrays.stream(dpTable).sum(); } }

import java.util.Arrays; public class Solution { public int numberOfWeakCharacters(int[][] properties) { Arrays.sort(properties, (a, b) -> a[0] == b[0] ? b[1] - a[1] : a[0] - b[0]); return computeNumberOfWeakCharacters(properties); } private int computeNumberOfWeakCharacters(int[][] properties) { int maxDefense = 0, weakCount = 0; for (int i = properties.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { if (properties[i][1] < maxDefense) { weakCount++; } else { maxDefense = properties[i][1]; } } return weakCount; } }

public class Solution { boolean canDestroyAll(int mass, int[] asteroids) { List remainingAsteroids = Arrays.stream(asteroids) .filter(a -> a > mass) .collect(Collectors.toList()); return remainingAsteroids.isEmpty(); } }

public class Solution { public int smallestIndex(int[] nums) { return computeSmallestIndex(nums); } private int computeSmallestIndex(int[] nums) { for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { if (i % 10 == nums[i]) { return i; } } return -1; } }

public class Solution { public String capitalizeTitle(String title) { StringBuilder result = new StringBuilder(); for (int i = 0; i < title.length(); ++i) { char character = title.charAt(i); if ((i == 0 || title.charAt(i - 1) == ' ') && Character.isLetter(character)) { result.append(Character.toUpperCase(character)); } else if (character == ' ') { result.append(character); } else { result.append(Character.toLowerCase(character)); } } return result.toString(); } }

public class Solution { boolean isAOnlyBeforeB(String s) { int lastIndexOfA = -1; for (int index = 0; index < s.length(); index++) { if (s.charAt(index) == 'a') { lastIndexOfA = index; } else if (s.charAt(index) == 'b' && lastIndexOfA > -1) { return false; } } return true; } }

public class Solution { public int numOfBeams(String[] bank) { int m = bank.length; int n = bank[0].length(); int beams = 0; for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { boolean hasOne = false; for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if (bank[i].charAt(j) == '1') { hasOne = true; beams += bank[i].substring(j + 1).replaceAll("0", "").length(); break; } } if (!hasOne && i > 0) { for (int k = 0; k < n; k++) { if (bank[i - 1].charAt(k) == '1') { beams += bank[i].substring(0, j).replaceAll("0", "").length(); break; } } } } return beams; } }

import java.util.Arrays; public class Solution { public int lastPassengerTime(int[] buses, int[] passengers, int capacity) { Arrays.sort(buses); Arrays.sort(passengers); int lastIndex = 0; for (int bus : buses) { int cnt = 0; boolean isWithinRange = false; while (!isWithinRange && lastIndex < passengers.length && passengers[lastIndex] <= bus && cnt < capacity) { isWithinRange = true; cnt++; lastIndex++; } } return lastIndex == 0 ? buses[0] - 1 : passengers[lastIndex - 1] - 1; } }

public class Solution { int minSumOfSquaredDifference(int[] nums1, int[] nums2, int k1, int k2) { long result = 0; for (int i = 0; i < nums1.length; ++i) { int diff = Math.abs(nums1[i] - nums2[i]); int steps = Math.min(k1 + k2, diff); diff -= steps; k1 -= Math.min(k1, steps); result += (long)diff * diff; } return (int)result; } }

public class Solution { public int minSeconds(int[] amount) { return ((amount[0] + amount[1] + amount[2]) + 1) / 2 - ((Math.max(amount[0] + amount[1], Math.max(amount[1] + amount[2], amount[0] + amount[2]))) + 1) / 2 + (Math.max(amount[0] + amount[1], Math.max(amount[1] + amount[2], amount[0] + amount[2]))); } }

public class Solution { public int maxSumNumbersWithEqualSumOfDigits(int[] nums) { HashMap digitSumToMax = new HashMap<>(); int ans = -1; for (int num : nums) { int sumOfDigits = calculateSumOfDigits(num); updateDigitSumMap(digitSumToMax, sumOfDigits, num); checkAndUpdateAnswer(ans, digitSumToMax.get(sumOfDigits), num); } return ans; } private static int calculateSumOfDigits(int num) { int sumOfDigits = 0; for (int temp = num; temp != 0; temp /= 10) { sumOfDigits += temp % 10; } return sumOfDigits; } private static void updateDigitSumMap(HashMap digitSumToMax, int sumOfDigits, int num) { int prevMax = digitSumToMax.getOrDefault(sumOfDigits, 0); digitSumToMax.put(sumOfDigits, Math.max(num, prevMax)); } private static void checkAndUpdateAnswer(int ans, int currentMax, int num) { if (currentMax != 0) { ans = Math.max(ans, num + currentMax); } } }

public class Solution { public int minDeletions(int[] nums, int[] numsDivide) { for (int num : nums) { boolean found = true; for (int d : numsDivide) { if (d % num != 0) { found = false; break; } } if (found) { return nums.length - countOccurrences(nums, num); } } return Integer.MAX_VALUE == res ? -1 : res; } private int countOccurrences(int[] array, int value) { int count = 0; for (int n : array) { if (n == value) { count++; } } return count; } }

import java.util.List; import java.util.stream.Collectors; public class Solution { public int numberOfSubarraysWithZeroes(int[] nums) { List zeroIndices = nums.stream() .map(num -> num == 0 ? 1 : -1) .collect(Collectors.toList()); int count = 0, sum = 0; for (int index : zeroIndices) { if (index == 1) { sum++; count += sum; } else { sum = 0; } } return count; } }

public class Solution { public int minDaysToCompleteTasks(int[] tasks, int space) { HashMap taskLastComplete = new HashMap<>(); List daysList = Arrays.stream(tasks) .map(task -> { if (taskLastComplete.containsKey(task)) { int passedDays = days - taskLastComplete.get(task); if (passedDays < space) { days += space - passedDays; } } days++; return days; }) .collect(Collectors.toList()); return daysList.stream().max(Integer::compare).orElse(0); } }

public class Solution { public int longestIdealString(String s, int k) { int[] dp = new int[26]; for (char c : s.toCharArray()) { updateDp(dp, c - 'a', k); } return findMaxValue(dp); } private void updateDp(int[] dp, int index, int k) { int current = 1; for (int i = 0; i < 26; ++i) { if (Math.abs(i - index) <= k) current = Math.max(current, dp[i] + 1); } dp[index] = Math.max(dp[index], current); } private int findMaxValue(int[] dp) { int max = 0; for (int value : dp) { max = Math.max(max, value); } return max; } }

public class Solution { public boolean equalSumSubarrays(int[] nums) { Set totals = new HashSet<>(); for (int i = 1; i < nums.length; ++i) { int total = nums[i] + nums[i - 1]; if (totals.contains(total)) return true; totals.add(total); } return false; } }

public class Solution { final int MOD = 1000000007; final int MAX = 1001; static final int MOD_CONSTANT = 1000000007; int ways(int startPos, int endPos, int k, int[][] dp) { if (k == 0) return startPos == endPos ? 1 : 0; if (startPos < 0 || endPos < 0 || startPos >= MAX || endPos >= MAX) return 0; if (dp[startPos][k] != -1) return dp[startPos][k]; int left = ways(startPos - 1, endPos, k - 1, dp); int right = ways(startPos + 1, endPos, k - 1, dp); return dp[startPos][k] = (left + right) % MOD_CONSTANT; } int numberOfWays(int startPos, int endPos, int k) { int[][] dp = new int[MAX][k + 1]; for (int[] row : dp) Arrays.fill(row, -1); return ways(startPos, endPos, k, dp); } }

public class Solution { public int minDays(int[] power) { int n = power.length; int ans = (int)1e9; int[] dp = new int[1 << n]; Arrays.fill(dp, (int)1e9); dp[0] = 0; int[] sortedPower = Arrays.copyOf(power, n); Arrays.sort(sortedPower); for (int i = 0; i < (1 << n); ++i) { int powerSum = 0; int gain = 1 + Integer.bitCount(i); boolean canGain = true; for (int j = 0; j < n && canGain; ++j) { if ((i & (1 << j)) != 0) { powerSum += sortedPower[j]; } else if (gain > sortedPower[j]) { dp[i | (1 << j)] = Math.min(dp[i | (1 << j)], dp[i] + 1); canGain = false; } } } return dp[(1 << n) - 1]; } }

public class Solution { public int mostFrequentEven(int[] nums) { Map count = new HashMap<>(); int maxCount = 0; int mostFrequent = -1; for (int num : nums) { if (num % 2 == 0) { int freq = count.getOrDefault(num, 0) + 1; count.put(num, freq); if (freq > maxCount || (freq == maxCount && num < mostFrequent)) { maxCount = freq; mostFrequent = num; } } } return mostFrequent; } }

import java.util.HashSet; public class Solution { public int min_substrs(String s) { return computeMin_substrs(s); } private int computeMin_substrs(String s) { HashSet seen = new HashSet<>(); int count = 0; for (char c : s.toCharArray()) { if (seen.contains(c)) { count++; seen.clear(); } seen.add(c); } return count + (seen.isEmpty() ? 0 : 1); } }

import java.util.Arrays; public class Solution { public int maxMatchings(int[] players, int[] trainers) { Arrays.sort(players); Arrays.sort(trainers); int playerIndex = 0, trainerIndex = 0, matchCount = 0; boolean isWithinRange = true; while (isWithinRange) { if (players[playerIndex] <= trainers[trainerIndex]) { matchCount++; playerIndex++; trainerIndex++; } else { trainerIndex++; } isWithinRange = playerIndex < players.length && trainerIndex < trainers.length; } return matchCount; } }

public class Solution { public int min_money(int[][] transactions) { return computeMinMoney(transactions); } private int computeMinMoney(int[][] transactions) { int min_money_needed = 0; for (int[] transaction : transactions) { min_money_needed = Math.max(min_money_needed, transaction[0] - transaction[1]); } return min_money_needed; } }

public class Solution { public int minOperations(int[] nums) { int colCount = nums.length; int i = 0, j = colCount - 1; int operations = 0; while (i < j) { if (nums[i] == nums[j]) { i++; j--; } else if (nums[i] < nums[j]) { nums[i + 1] += nums[i]; i++; operations++; } else { nums[j - 1] += nums[j]; j--; operations++; } } return operations; } }

import java.util.HashMap; public class Solution { public boolean canEqualFrequency(String word) { HashMap freq = new HashMap<>(); for (char c : word.toCharArray()) { freq.put(c, freq.getOrDefault(c, 0) + 1); } HashMap count_freq = new HashMap<>(); int a = -1, b = -1; int acount = 0, bcount = 0; for (int f : freq.values()) { if (!count_freq.containsKey(f)) { if (a == -1) { a = f; acount++; } else if (b == -1) { b = f; bcount++; } else { return false; // More than 2 unique frequencies } } else { int existingCount = count_freq.get(f); if (existingCount > 0 && a != -1 && b != -1) { return false; // More than 2 unique frequencies } if (a == f) { acount += existingCount; } else if (b == f) { bcount += existingCount; } } } count_freq.put(a, acount); count_freq.put(b, bcount); return (acount == 1 && (a - 1 == b || a == 1)) || (bcount == 1 && (b - 1 == a || b == 1)); } }

public class Solution { public int minOperations(int[] nums) { return computeMinOperations(nums); } private int computeMinOperations(int[] nums) { int operations = 0; for (int i = 1; i < nums.length; i++) { if (nums[i] <= nums[i - 1]) { operations += (nums[i - 1] - nums[i]) + 1; nums[i] = nums[i - 1] + 1; } } return operations; } }

public class Solution { public int maxFrequency(int[] nums, int k) { Arrays.sort(nums); int colCount = nums.length, i = 0; long total = 0; int max_freq = 0; for (int j = 0; j < colCount; j++) { total += nums[j]; while (total + k < (long) nums[j] * (j - i + 1)) { total -= nums[i++]; } max_freq = Math.max(max_freq, j - i + 1); } return max_freq; } }

public class Solution { public int maximumElementAfterDecrementingAndRearranging(int[] array) { Arrays.sort(array); array[0] = 1; for (int i = 1; i < array.length; i++) { array[i] = Math.min(array[i], array[i - 1] + 1); } return array[array.length - 1]; } }

public class Solution { public int subsetXORSum(int[] nums) { int result = 0, n = nums.length, max_val = 1 << n; for (int i = 1; i < max_val; i++) { int xor_total = 0; for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if ((i & (1 << j)) > 0) { xor_total ^= nums[j]; } } result += xor_total; } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int maximumRemovals(String s, String p, int[] removable) { int low = 0, high = removable.length; while (low < high) { int mid = (low + high + 1) / 2; StringBuilder temp_s = new StringBuilder(s); for (int i = 0; i < mid; i++) { temp_s.setCharAt(removable[i], '-'); } if (isSubsequence(temp_s.toString(), p)) { low = mid; } else { high = mid - 1; } } return low; } private boolean isSubsequence(String s, String t) { int i = 0, j = 0; while (i < s.length() && j < t.length()) { if (s.charAt(i) == t.charAt(j)) { j++; } i++; } return j == t.length(); } }

public class Solution { public boolean checkOnesSegment(String s) { return computeCheckOnesSegment(s); } private int computeCheckOnesSegment(String s) { int count = 0; for (int i = 0; i < s.length(); i++) { if (s.charAt(i) == '1') { if (i > 0 && s.charAt(i - 1) == '0') { count++; } } } return count <= 1 ? 1 : 0; } }

public class Solution { public int eliminateMaximum(int[] dist, int[] speed) { int n = dist.length; int[] timeToReachCity = new int[n]; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { timeToReachCity[i] = (dist[i] + speed[i] - 1) / speed[i]; } Arrays.sort(timeToReachCity); int eliminated = 0; for (int i = 0; i < n && timeToReachCity[i] > i; i++) { eliminated++; } return eliminated; } }

public class Solution { private static final long MOD = 1000000007; public int numOfWays(int m, int n) { long a = 6, b = 6, c = 3, d = 3; while (--n > 0) { long temp_a = a, temp_c = c; a = (a * 3 + b * 2) % MOD; b = (temp_a * 2 + b * 2) % MOD; c = (c * 3 + d * 2) % MOD; d = (temp_c * 2 + d * 2) % MOD; } return (int)(m == 1 ? b : (a + c) % MOD); } }

import java.util.*; public class Solution { public int smallestChair(int[][] times, int targetFriend) { TreeMap events = new TreeMap<>(); for (int i = 0; i < times.length; ++i) { events.put(times[i][0], i); events.put(times[i][1], ~i); } TreeSet availableChairs = new TreeSet<>(); for (int i = 0; i < times.length; i++) { availableChairs.add(i); } int[] assignedChair = new int[times.length]; for (Map.Entry entry : events.entrySet()) { int idx = entry.getValue(); if (idx >= 0) { int chair = availableChairs.first(); availableChairs.remove(chair); assignedChair[idx] = chair; return idx == targetFriend ? chair : -1; // Early return for the target friend } else { availableChairs.add(assignedChair[~idx]); } } return -1; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.List; import java.util.Map; import java.util.TreeMap; public class Solution { public List> splitPainting(int[][] segments) { TreeMap line = new TreeMap<>(); for (int[] s : segments) { int start = s[0]; int end = s[1]; int color = s[2]; line.put(start, line.getOrDefault(start, 0) + color); line.put(end, line.getOrDefault(end, 0) - color); } List> res = new ArrayList<>(); int pre = 0, sum = 0; for (Map.Entry entry : line.entrySet()) { if (pre > 0 && sum > 0) { List temp = new ArrayList<>(); temp.add(pre); temp.add(entry.getKey()); temp.add(sum); res.add(temp); } pre = entry.getKey(); sum += entry.getValue(); } return res; } }

public class Solution { public String replaceDigits(String s) { char[] array = s.toCharArray(); for (int i = 1; i < array.length; i += 2) { array[i] = (char) (array[i - 1] + (array[i] - '0')); } return new String(array); } }

public class Solution { public int countGoodSubstrings(String s) { int count = 0; for (int i = 0; i < s.length() - 2; i++) { boolean isMatch = s.charAt(i) != s.charAt(i + 1) && s.charAt(i) != s.charAt(i + 2) && s.charAt(i + 1) != s.charAt(i + 2); if (isMatch) count++; } return count; } }

public class Solution { private static final long MOD = 1000000007; public int firstDayBeenInAllRooms(int[] nextVisit) { int n = nextVisit.length; long ans = 0; long[] dp = new long[n]; for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) { dp[i] = (dp[i - 1] * 2 - dp[nextVisit[i - 1]] + 2) % MOD; } return (int)dp[n - 1]; } }

import java.util.Arrays; public class Solution { public boolean canBeSorted(int[] nums) { int[] sorted_nums = Arrays.copyOf(nums, nums.length); Arrays.sort(sorted_nums); for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { boolean isMatch = nums[i] != sorted_nums[i] && gcd(nums[i], sorted_nums[i]) == 1; if (!isMatch) { return false; } } return true; } private int gcd(int a, int b) { while (b != 0) { int temp = b; b = a % b; a = temp; } return a; } }

public class Solution { public boolean stoneGameIX(int[] stones) { List cnt = Arrays.stream(stones).boxed().collect(Collectors.toList()); return (cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 1).count() != 0 && cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 2).count() != 0) || (cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 1).count() > cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 2).count() ? cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 1).count() > cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 2).count() + 2 : cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 2).count() > cnt.stream().filter(s -> s % 3 == 1).count() + 1); } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public int maxQuality_dfs(int node, int time_left, int[] visited, int[] values, List> neighbors) { int acc = 0; for (int[] edge : neighbors.get(node)) { int neighbor = edge[0], cost = edge[1]; boolean isMatch = time_left >= cost && visited[neighbor] == 0; if (isMatch) { visited[neighbor] = 1; acc = Math.max(acc, values[neighbor] + maxQuality_dfs(neighbor, time_left - cost, visited, values, neighbors)); visited[neighbor] = 0; } } return acc; } public int maxQuality(int[] values, int[][] edges, int maxTime) { List> neighbors = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < values.length; i++) { neighbors.add(new ArrayList<>()); } for (int[] edge : edges) { neighbors.get(edge[0]).add(new int[]{edge[1], edge[2]}); neighbors.get(edge[1]).add(new int[]{edge[0], edge[2]}); } int[] visited = new int[values.length]; return maxQuality_dfs(0, maxTime, visited, values, neighbors); } }

public class Solution { public int timeToBuyTickets(int[] tickets, int k) { int time = 0; while (tickets[k] > 0) { for (int i = 0; i < tickets.length; ++i) { if (tickets[i] <= 0) continue; --tickets[i]; ++time; if (i == k && tickets[k] == 0) break; } } return time; } }

public class Solution { public ListNode reverseGroup(ListNode head, int k) { boolean isMatch = (head == null || k == 1); if (isMatch) return head; ListNode prev = null; ListNode cur = head; for (int i = 0; i < k; i++) { ListNode next = cur.next; cur.next = prev; prev = cur; cur = next; } head.next = cur; return prev; } public ListNode reverseEvenGroups(ListNode head) { ListNode dummy = new ListNode(0); dummy.next = head; ListNode prev = dummy; int n = 0; for (ListNode cur = head; cur != null; cur = cur.next) n++; for (int i = 1, k = 1; n >= 0 && k <= n; i++, k += i) { if (i % 2 == 0) { ListNode tail = prev.next; ListNode next = prev.next; for (int j = 0; j < k; j++) next = next.next; prev.next = reverseGroup(tail, k); tail.next = next; } n -= k; for (int j = 0; j < k && prev != null; j++) prev = prev.next; } return dummy.next; } }

public class Solution { public int numSmoothDescentPeriods(int[] prices) { return computeNumSmoothDescentPeriods(prices); } private int computeNumSmoothDescentPeriods(int[] prices) { int result = 0; int count = 0; for (int i = 1; i < prices.length; ++i) { if (prices[i] == prices[i - 1] - 1) { ++count; } else { count = 0; } result += count + 1; } return result + 1; } }

public class Solution { int minSumOfSquaredDifference(int[] nums1, int[] nums2, int k1, int k2) { long result = 0; for (int i = 0; i < nums1.length; ++i) { int diff = Math.abs(nums1[i] - nums2[i]); int steps = Math.min(k1 + k2, diff); diff -= steps; k1 -= Math.min(k1, steps); result += (long)diff * diff; } return (int)result; } }

public class Solution { public int maxSumNumbersWithEqualSumOfDigits(int[] nums) { HashMap digitSumToMax = new HashMap<>(); int ans = -1; for (int num : nums) { int sumOfDigits = calculateSumOfDigits(num); updateDigitSumMap(digitSumToMax, sumOfDigits, num); checkAndUpdateAnswer(ans, digitSumToMax.get(sumOfDigits), num); } return ans; } private static int calculateSumOfDigits(int num) { int sumOfDigits = 0; for (int temp = num; temp != 0; temp /= 10) { sumOfDigits += temp % 10; } return sumOfDigits; } private static void updateDigitSumMap(HashMap digitSumToMax, int sumOfDigits, int num) { int prevMax = digitSumToMax.getOrDefault(sumOfDigits, 0); digitSumToMax.put(sumOfDigits, Math.max(num, prevMax)); } private static void checkAndUpdateAnswer(int ans, int currentMax, int num) { if (currentMax != 0) { ans = Math.max(ans, num + currentMax); } } }

public class Solution { public int minDeletions(int[] nums, int[] numsDivide) { for (int num : nums) { boolean found = true; for (int d : numsDivide) { if (d % num != 0) { found = false; break; } } if (found) { return nums.length - countOccurrences(nums, num); } } return Integer.MAX_VALUE == res ? -1 : res; } private int countOccurrences(int[] array, int value) { int count = 0; for (int n : array) { if (n == value) { count++; } } return count; } }

import java.util.List; import java.util.stream.Collectors; public class Solution { public int numberOfSubarraysWithZeroes(int[] nums) { List zeroIndices = nums.stream() .map(num -> num == 0 ? 1 : -1) .collect(Collectors.toList()); int count = 0, sum = 0; for (int index : zeroIndices) { if (index == 1) { sum++; count += sum; } else { sum = 0; } } return count; } }

public class Solution { public int longestIdealString(String s, int k) { int[] dp = new int[26]; for (char c : s.toCharArray()) { updateDp(dp, c - 'a', k); } return findMaxValue(dp); } private void updateDp(int[] dp, int index, int k) { int current = 1; for (int i = 0; i < 26; ++i) { if (Math.abs(i - index) <= k) current = Math.max(current, dp[i] + 1); } dp[index] = Math.max(dp[index], current); } private int findMaxValue(int[] dp) { int max = 0; for (int value : dp) { max = Math.max(max, value); } return max; } }

public class Solution { public boolean equalSumSubarrays(int[] nums) { Set totals = new HashSet<>(); for (int i = 1; i < nums.length; ++i) { int total = nums[i] + nums[i - 1]; if (totals.contains(total)) return true; totals.add(total); } return false; } }

public class Solution { final int MOD = 1000000007; final int MAX = 1001; static final int MOD_CONSTANT = 1000000007; int ways(int startPos, int endPos, int k, int[][] dp) { if (k == 0) return startPos == endPos ? 1 : 0; if (startPos < 0 || endPos < 0 || startPos >= MAX || endPos >= MAX) return 0; if (dp[startPos][k] != -1) return dp[startPos][k]; int left = ways(startPos - 1, endPos, k - 1, dp); int right = ways(startPos + 1, endPos, k - 1, dp); return dp[startPos][k] = (left + right) % MOD_CONSTANT; } int numberOfWays(int startPos, int endPos, int k) { int[][] dp = new int[MAX][k + 1]; for (int[] row : dp) Arrays.fill(row, -1); return ways(startPos, endPos, k, dp); } }

public class Solution { public int minDays(int[] power) { int n = power.length; int ans = (int)1e9; int[] dp = new int[1 << n]; Arrays.fill(dp, (int)1e9); dp[0] = 0; int[] sortedPower = Arrays.copyOf(power, n); Arrays.sort(sortedPower); for (int i = 0; i < (1 << n); ++i) { int powerSum = 0; int gain = 1 + Integer.bitCount(i); boolean canGain = true; for (int j = 0; j < n && canGain; ++j) { if ((i & (1 << j)) != 0) { powerSum += sortedPower[j]; } else if (gain > sortedPower[j]) { dp[i | (1 << j)] = Math.min(dp[i | (1 << j)], dp[i] + 1); canGain = false; } } } return dp[(1 << n) - 1]; } }

public class Solution { public int mostFrequentEven(int[] nums) { Map count = new HashMap<>(); int maxCount = 0; int mostFrequent = -1; for (int num : nums) { if (num % 2 == 0) { int freq = count.getOrDefault(num, 0) + 1; count.put(num, freq); if (freq > maxCount || (freq == maxCount && num < mostFrequent)) { maxCount = freq; mostFrequent = num; } } } return mostFrequent; } }

import java.util.HashSet; public class Solution { public int min_substrs(String s) { return computeMin_substrs(s); } private int computeMin_substrs(String s) { HashSet seen = new HashSet<>(); int count = 0; for (char c : s.toCharArray()) { if (seen.contains(c)) { count++; seen.clear(); } seen.add(c); } return count + (seen.isEmpty() ? 0 : 1); } }

import java.util.Arrays; public class Solution { public int maxMatchings(int[] players, int[] trainers) { Arrays.sort(players); Arrays.sort(trainers); int playerIndex = 0, trainerIndex = 0, matchCount = 0; boolean isWithinRange = true; while (isWithinRange) { if (players[playerIndex] <= trainers[trainerIndex]) { matchCount++; playerIndex++; trainerIndex++; } else { trainerIndex++; } isWithinRange = playerIndex < players.length && trainerIndex < trainers.length; } return matchCount; } }

public class Solution { public int min_money(int[][] transactions) { return computeMinMoney(transactions); } private int computeMinMoney(int[][] transactions) { int min_money_needed = 0; for (int[] transaction : transactions) { min_money_needed = Math.max(min_money_needed, transaction[0] - transaction[1]); } return min_money_needed; } }

public class Solution { public int minOperations(int[] nums) { int colCount = nums.length; int i = 0, j = colCount - 1; int operations = 0; while (i < j) { if (nums[i] == nums[j]) { i++; j--; } else if (nums[i] < nums[j]) { nums[i + 1] += nums[i]; i++; operations++; } else { nums[j - 1] += nums[j]; j--; operations++; } } return operations; } }

import java.util.HashMap; public class Solution { public boolean canEqualFrequency(String word) { HashMap freq = new HashMap<>(); for (char c : word.toCharArray()) { freq.put(c, freq.getOrDefault(c, 0) + 1); } HashMap count_freq = new HashMap<>(); int a = -1, b = -1; int acount = 0, bcount = 0; for (int f : freq.values()) { if (!count_freq.containsKey(f)) { if (a == -1) { a = f; acount++; } else if (b == -1) { b = f; bcount++; } else { return false; // More than 2 unique frequencies } } else { int existingCount = count_freq.get(f); if (existingCount > 0 && a != -1 && b != -1) { return false; // More than 2 unique frequencies } if (a == f) { acount += existingCount; } else if (b == f) { bcount += existingCount; } } } count_freq.put(a, acount); count_freq.put(b, bcount); return (acount == 1 && (a - 1 == b || a == 1)) || (bcount == 1 && (b - 1 == a || b == 1)); } }

import java.util.*; public class Solution { public int smallestChair(int[][] times, int targetFriend) { TreeMap events = new TreeMap<>(); for (int i = 0; i < times.length; ++i) { events.put(times[i][0], i); events.put(times[i][1], ~i); } TreeSet availableChairs = new TreeSet<>(); for (int i = 0; i < times.length; i++) { availableChairs.add(i); } int[] assignedChair = new int[times.length]; for (Map.Entry entry : events.entrySet()) { int idx = entry.getValue(); if (idx >= 0) { int chair = availableChairs.first(); availableChairs.remove(chair); assignedChair[idx] = chair; return idx == targetFriend ? chair : -1; // Early return for the target friend } else { availableChairs.add(assignedChair[~idx]); } } return -1; } }

import java.util.*; public class Solution { public int smallestChair(int[][] times, int targetFriend) { TreeMap events = new TreeMap<>(); for (int i = 0; i < times.length; ++i) { events.put(times[i][0], i); events.put(times[i][1], ~i); } TreeSet availableChairs = new TreeSet<>(); for (int i = 0; i < times.length; i++) { availableChairs.add(i); } int[] assignedChair = new int[times.length]; for (Map.Entry entry : events.entrySet()) { int idx = entry.getValue(); if (idx >= 0) { int chair = availableChairs.first(); availableChairs.remove(chair); assignedChair[idx] = chair; return idx == targetFriend ? chair : -1; // Early return for the target friend } else { availableChairs.add(assignedChair[~idx]); } } return -1; } }

public class Solution { public int maximumRemovals(String s, String p, int[] removable) { int low = 0, high = removable.length; while (low < high) { int mid = (low + high + 1) / 2; StringBuilder temp_s = new StringBuilder(s); for (int i = 0; i < mid; i++) { temp_s.setCharAt(removable[i], '-'); } if (isSubsequence(temp_s.toString(), p)) { low = mid; } else { high = mid - 1; } } return low; } private boolean isSubsequence(String s, String t) { int i = 0, j = 0; while (i < s.length() && j < t.length()) { if (s.charAt(i) == t.charAt(j)) { j++; } i++; } return j == t.length(); } }

public class Solution { public boolean checkOnesSegment(String s) { return computeCheckOnesSegment(s); } private int computeCheckOnesSegment(String s) { int count = 0; for (int i = 0; i < s.length(); i++) { if (s.charAt(i) == '1') { if (i > 0 && s.charAt(i - 1) == '0') { count++; } } } return count <= 1 ? 1 : 0; } }

public class Solution { public int eliminateMaximum(int[] dist, int[] speed) { int n = dist.length; int[] timeToReachCity = new int[n]; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { timeToReachCity[i] = (dist[i] + speed[i] - 1) / speed[i]; } Arrays.sort(timeToReachCity); int eliminated = 0; for (int i = 0; i < n && timeToReachCity[i] > i; i++) { eliminated++; } return eliminated; } }

public class Solution { private static final long MOD = 1000000007; public int numOfWays(int m, int n) { long a = 6, b = 6, c = 3, d = 3; while (--n > 0) { long temp_a = a, temp_c = c; a = (a * 3 + b * 2) % MOD; b = (temp_a * 2 + b * 2) % MOD; c = (c * 3 + d * 2) % MOD; d = (temp_c * 2 + d * 2) % MOD; } return (int)(m == 1 ? b : (a + c) % MOD); } }

import java.util.*; public class Solution { public int smallestChair(int[][] times, int targetFriend) { TreeMap events = new TreeMap<>(); for (int i = 0; i < times.length; ++i) { events.put(times[i][0], i); events.put(times[i][1], ~i); } TreeSet availableChairs = new TreeSet<>(); for (int i = 0; i < times.length; i++) { availableChairs.add(i); } int[] assignedChair = new int[times.length]; for (Map.Entry entry : events.entrySet()) { int idx = entry.getValue(); if (idx >= 0) { int chair = availableChairs.first(); availableChairs.remove(chair); assignedChair[idx] = chair; return idx == targetFriend ? chair : -1; // Early return for the target friend } else { availableChairs.add(assignedChair[~idx]); } } return -1; } }
